sodacircle
DashboardSearchCandidatesOutreachRepliesAgents
1 agent running

Sourcing · active

Step 4

Reply triage

Classify inbound responses. Interested candidates get routed to your ATS. Everything else gets the right follow-up action.

● 1 Interested◐ 1 Maybe later○ 1 Not interested
JD

Jane Doe

inbound reply
● Interested

“This sounds interesting. Happy to learn more next week.”

Classification

Alert the sodacircle team in Slack and draft an Ashby candidate record.

ML

Marcus Lee

inbound reply
◐ Maybe later

“Timing is tight this quarter, but circle back in 60 days.”

Classification

Snooze and re-queue for follow-up in 60 days.

NK

Noah Kim

inbound reply
○ Not interested

“Appreciate it, but this isn't aligned with my next move.”

Classification

Archive and tag with low security relevance.
